title: Build a Large Language Model (From Scratch)
subtitle:
Learn How to Create, Train, and Tweak Large Language Models by
    Building One from the Ground Up
author: Sebastian Raschka
themes: Building LLMs from first principles without library abstractions
Understanding attention mechanisms and transformer architectures
Pretraining on unlabeled data via next-token prediction
Democratizing LLM knowledge through hands-on coding
awards: Amazon #1 New Release in AI & Machine Learning (2024)
excerpt:
Plan and code all the parts of an LLM from the ground up.
    Bestselling author Sebastian Raschka guides you step by step through
    creating your own GPT-style LLM — from text embedding and attention
    mechanisms to pretraining and fine-tuning — using Python and PyTorch,
    all on an ordinary laptop.
